import React from "react"; import "./Profile.css"; import profileData from "../data/ProfileData"; import GitHubLogo from "../Logo/GitHubLogo.svg"; import TelegramLogo from "../Logo/TelegramLogo.svg"; import GmailLogo from "../Logo/GmailLogo.png"; import LinkedInLogo from "../Logo/LinkedInLogo.svg"; const Profile = () => { const { name, role, profilePhoto, cvFile, summary, education, researchInterests, workTimeline, publications, contacts } = profileData; return (

{role}

{edu.period}
{edu.title}

{edu.institution}

))}

Research Interests

{researchInterests.map((r, i) => ( {r} ))}

Work Experience

{workTimeline.map((job, i) => (
{job.period} {job.title}

{job.description}

))}

Curriculum Vitae

    {profileData.cvFiles.map((cv, i) => (
  • {cv.name} (PDF)
    • ))}

Publications

    {profileData.publications.map((pub, i) => (
  • {pub.title} — {pub.venue}   Download PDF
    • ))}

); }; export default Profile;
